/*# sourceURL=https://mamavation.com/wp-includes/blocks/button/style.min.css */</style><style id='mamavation-inline-css' type='text/css'>.flex-entry.testimonial {
				background-color: transparent;
				border-radius: 5px;
			}
			.mai-slider[data-slidestoshow="1"] .flex-entry.testimonial.slick-slide {
				border: none;
				-webkit-box-shadow: none;
				box-shadow: none;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header {
				-webkit-box-ordinal-group: 3;-ms-flex-order: 2;order: 2;
				padding-top: 12px;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header span {
				display: inline-block;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .entry-title,
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .title {
				font-size: 1.2rem;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .entry-title {
				font-weight: bold;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .title {
				font-size: 1rem;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .title::before {
				display: inline-block;
				content: "-";
				margin: 0 6px;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-header .url {
				display: block;
				font-size: 1rem;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-content {
				font-style: italic;
				letter-spacing: 1px;
			}
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-image-link {
				max-width: 120px;
				border-radius: 50%;
				overflow: hidden;
			}
			/* offset negative margin */
			.flex-entry.testimonial .entry-image-link.entry-image-before-entry.alignnone {
				width: auto;
				margin-left: auto;
				margin-right: auto;
			}

		--header-spacer: 0;
		--text-title: 100%;
		--logo-width: 1200px;
		--logo-shrink-width: 300px;
		--logo-margin-top: 0px;
		--logo-margin-bottom: 0px;
	}
	.site-title.has-text-title a {
		font-size: var(--text-title);
	}
	@media only screen and (min-width: 769px) {
		.site-title a {
			margin-top: var(--logo-margin-top);
			margin-bottom: var(--logo-margin-bottom);
		}
		.custom-logo-link {
			max-width: var(--logo-width);
		}
	}
	@media only screen and (max-width: 768px) {
		.site-title a {
			margin-top: 5px;
			margin-bottom: 0px;
		}
		.custom-logo-link {
			max-width: var(--logo-shrink-width);
		}
	}</style><style>@media only screen and (max-width: 768px) {

    font-size: 30px !important;
}
}

	display: none;
}
b, strong {
    font-weight: bolder !important;

	color:#888888;*/

}
form.hustle-layout-form {
    background-color: #a9cf38 !IMPORTANT;
}
.hustle-layout-body {
    /* padding: 50px !IMPORTANT; */

    padding-right: 7% !IMPORTANT;

}
.hustle-content-wrap {
    padding: 15px !IMPORTANT;
}

    padding: 0px !IMPORTANT;
}
.hustle-field {

    max-width: 100% !important;

}

}

    /* max-width: 100% !IMPORTANT; */

    border-bottom-left-radius: 3px !important;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 3px !important;
    border-bottom-width: 0px !important;
    border-color: rgba(0,0,0,.35) !important;
    border-left-width: 0px !important;
    border-right-width: 0px !important;
    border-style: none !important;
    border-top-left-radius: 3px !important;
    border-top-right-radius: 3px !important;
    border-top-width: 0px !important;
    box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px 0px #ffffff !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: Open Sans !important;
    font-size: 16px !important;
    font-weight: 900 !important;
    -webkit-letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    -moz-letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    -ms-letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
    margin-left: 0px !important;
    margin-right: 0px !important;
    margin-top: 0px !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    padding-bottom: 19px !important;
    padding-left: 12px !important;
    padding-right: 12px !important;
    padding-top: 18px !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    -webkit-text-decoration: none !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    font-style: initial !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    cursor: pointer;
}

    border: none;
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;

    outline: none;
    opacity: 0;
    padding: 0;
    position: absolute;
    top: -7px !IMPORTANT;
    right: -5px !IMPORTANT;

    text-align: center;
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    font-weight: bold !IMPORTANT;
}

	section#pink-img-home-new-2 p{margin:12px auto;}
  .mobile-vv{display:block;}
  .desktop-vv{display:none;}
}

table tr td, table tr th {
    min-width: 150px;
}

.subscription-container {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    grid-gap: 20px;
    width: 80%;
    max-width: 800px;
    padding: 20px;
}
.subscription-container-mult {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    grid-gap: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 20px;
}
.subscription-container-mult h2{
	font-size: 20px;
	height:0px;
}

.subscription-container-mult .subscription-box h2{
	height: auto;
}

.subscription-box {
    background-color: white;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 40px 35px;
    height: 100%; /* Ensures the box itself stretches to the grid item height */
}

.sub-content {
    flex-grow: 1; /* Ensures this content takes up available space */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between; /* Space elements evenly */
}

.subscription-box h2 {
    color: #333;
	height: 130px;
	align-content: center;
}

.subscription-box p {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #666;
}

.sub-btn {
    background-color: #ec008c;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    padding: 15px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 16px;
    margin-top: auto; /* Pushes the button to the bottom */
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

.sub-btn:hover {
    background-color: #c90178;
}





.content-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    width: 100%;
    margin: 20px;
}

.text-section {
    flex: 1;
    padding-right: 20px;
}

.text-section h1 {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    color: #333;
}

.text-section p {
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #666;
}

.action-btn {
    background-color: #ec008c;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    padding: 15px 32px;
    text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 16px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

.action-btn:hover {
    background-color: #45a049;
}

.image-section {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.image-section img {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    border-radius: 8px;
}

.main-body{
	 margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    height: 100%;
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.background-subscribe {
    background-image: url('https://mamavation.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/frey-vineyards-independently-tested-for-glyphosate-usda-organic-biodynamic-wine-3.jpg');
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    height: 720px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
	padding:100px;
	border-radius:10px;
}

.center-square {
    background-color: #f6f6f6;
    padding: 40px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,4%);
	margin:50px;
	padding: 150px 60px;
}

.center-sq{
	    padding: 40px;
      text-align: center;
}

.center-square h1 {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.sub-body {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 20px;
}

.accordion-container {
    width: 100%;
}

.accordion {
    background-color: white;
    border-radius: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.accordion-item {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
}

.accordion-header {
    background-color: #f4f4f4;
    color: #333;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 18px;
    width: 100%;
    border: none;
    text-align: left;
    outline: none;
    font-size: 18px;
    transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
}

.accordion-header:hover {
    background-color: #ddd;
}

.accordion-header.active {
    background-color: #ccc;
}

.accordion-content {
    max-height: 0;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin: 0 2rem;
    padding-left: 1rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
}

.accordion-content p {
    margin: 18px 0;
}

.btn-sub{
	display: flex;
   justify-content: center;
	  gap: 10px;
}
.ugb-pricing-box{
	margin-bottom: 0;
    margin-top: 0;
}
.wp-block-separator {
    border: 1px solid;
    border-left: none;
    border-right: none;
	  opacity: 1;
	  color: #d6d6d6;
	  margin-top: 44px;
	  margin-bottom: 44px;
	  border-collapse: collapse;
}
.bk-color{
	background-color: #f6f6f6;
	padding-bottom: 70px;
    padding-top: 70px;
}
.bk-no{
	background-color: #f6f6f6;
}
.bk-main{
		margin-bottom: 35px;
    margin-top: 35px;
    padding: 0;
}

// FAQ
.accordion{
	padding: 20px;
}
p.accordion {
    background-color: #eee;
    color: #444;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 18px;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: left;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    transition: 0.4s;
    margin-bottom:10px;
}

/* Add a background color to the accordion if it is clicked on (add the .active class with JS), and when you move the mouse over it (hover) */
p.accordion.active, p.accordion:hover {
    background-color: #ddd;
}

/* Unicode character for "plus" sign (+) */
p.accordion:after {
    content: '\2795'; 
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #777;
    float: right;
    margin-left: 5px;
}

/* Unicode character for "minus" sign (-) */
p.accordion.active:after {
    content: "\2796"; 
}

/* Style the element that is used for the panel class */

div.panel {
    padding: 0 18px;
    background-color: white;
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: 0.4s ease-in-out;
    opacity: 0;
    margin-bottom:10px;
}

div.panel.show {
    opacity: 1;
    max-height: 500px; /* Whatever you like, as long as its more than the height of the content (on all screen sizes) */
}

.gen-sub{
	text-align: center;
	margin-top:10px;
}


@media only screen and (max-width: 767px) {
	.main-body{
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: collumn;
	}
	.btn-sub{
		display:block;
		gap: 0;

	}
	.center-square{
		margin: 15px;
		padding: 35px;
	}
	.background-subscribe{
		height: auto;
		padding: 0;
	}
	.subscription-container{
		display: block;
		width: 100%;
	}
	.subscription-box{
		margin-bottom:15px;
		padding: 30px 15px;
	}
	.bk-color{
		padding-top: 0;
	
	}
	.content-container{
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: column-reverse;
		margin: none;
	}
	.subscription-box {
	height: auto;
}
.subscription-container-mult {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr);
    grid-gap: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 20px;
	margin-top: 0px;
}
}</style></head><body class="home wp-singular page-template page-template-sections page-template-sections-php page page-id-45 wp-custom-logo wp-theme-genesis wp-child-theme-mamavation header-image Products<br />
Revealing Truths, Protecting Futures</p></div></div></section><section class="section" style="background-color: #ffffff;"><div class="wrap height-sm center-xs"><div class="section-content width-xl"><h2 class="heading2" style="text-align: center; color: #ec068c;">Welcome to Mamavation!</h2><h3 class="black" style="text-align: center;">We&#8217;re so glad you&#8217;re here!</h3><p style="text-align: center;">In a world where consumer choices can profoundly influence well-being, discerning families deserve clarity. Mamavation delivers rigorous, independent laboratory testing to detect hormone-disrupting chemicals, persistent pollutants, and other contaminants in products families use daily.</p><p style="text-align: center;">Through meticulous analysis and reporting, we identify safer alternatives, highlight concerning formulations, and guide you toward choices that protect your health and the environment. Our investigations span groceries, personal care, household essentials, and beyond—always prioritizing evidence over marketing claims.</p><p style="text-align: center;"><a class="button" href="https://mamavation.com/about-leah-segedie" data-wpel-link="internal">About</a></p><p><br /> <script type="litespeed/javascript"     .home .nav-primary .current-menu-item>a,
    .nav-primary,
    .nav-primary .menu-item>a,
    .nav-primary .nav-search,
    .nav-primary .sub-menu a {

    .nav-primary .menu-item>a:focus,

    .nav-primary .nav-search:focus,
    .nav-primary .nav-search:hover,

    .nav-primary .sub-menu a:hover,

    .nav-primary>.menu-item-has-children:not(.current-menu-ancestor):focus>a,
    .nav-primary>.menu-item-has-children:not(.current-menu-ancestor):hover>a,

    }

        display: none
